payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: tall dark wood cabinet, edge crop
payload.long_description: Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet with vertical recessed-panel doors and a matte finish; top and right sides are cut off in the crop (edge-cropped), lower front shows scuffs and wear—appears to be about 1.5 meters from the camera.
